name: research
description: Research anything - web search, URL fetch, academic papers, GitHub, HackerNews. No API keys required.

optional.scrapling[fetchers]: Stealth fetching - bypasses Cloudflare and anti-bot
optional.scrapling[all]: Dynamic fetching - full Playwright browser for JS-heavy sites
optional.BRAVE_API_KEY: Brave Search API - best quality results, 2000 free/month at api.search.brave.com
